name: Personal Financial Advisor
description: A personal finance co-worker that monitors a local document folder. Put statements, receipts, bills, income records, images, text, JSON, or CSV files in the input folder; it OCRs and organizes the evidence, performs privacy-safe public research where useful, and writes review-only household finance summaries, risks, reminders, and source-grounded reports to the output folder.

document_folder.description: Local folder monitored for personal finance documents, statements, receipts, bills, income records, and images.

output_folder.description: Local folder where JSON and Markdown advisor reports should be written.

field_profile.description: Financial fields and review areas captured by the advisor.

public_dataset.description: Public dataset selected as the sample input source.

example.name: AgamiAI Indian Bank Statement Synthetic Dataset
example.availability_note: Public synthetic bank statement sample used only as one finance-document demo source; real runs can include statements, income docs, receipts, bills, images, text, JSON, and CSV files.
example.download_hint: Use the bundled sample files or fetch a small public sample before trying a larger local folder.

monitoring.description: Folder monitoring configuration for one-shot or continuous polling runs.

input_folder.description: Default local input folder for sample files or user-provided files.

contract.summary: Households, solo operators, and financial coaches need a private continuous service coworker that can watch incoming finance documents, summarize cash-flow status, identify missing or risky items, and prepare human-review advice without moving money or sharing data.
users: Individuals, households, freelancers, financial coaches, and operations teams reviewing personal finance documents.

dataset_input.name: AgamiAI Indian Bank Statement Synthetic Dataset
dataset_input.availability_note: Public synthetic bank statement sample used only as one finance-document demo source; real runs can include statements, income docs, receipts, bills, images, text, JSON, and CSV files.
dataset_input.download_hint: Use the bundled sample files or fetch a small public sample before trying a larger local folder.

steps.label: Financial Folder Watcher
steps.goal: Resolve the monitored folder, output folder, monitoring settings, and sample input notes.

steps.label: Financial Document Reader
steps.goal: Read embedded text and call shared llm_ocr_skill for scanned or low-text statements, receipts, bills, income documents, and images.

steps.label: Financial Activity Classifier
steps.goal: Classify income, expenses, balances, bills, fees, debt obligations, and source document types.

steps.label: Financial Health Assessor
steps.goal: Estimate cash-flow status, identify document gaps, reminders, anomalies, and review-only risk flags.

steps.label: Financial Market Researcher
steps.goal: Use w3m_browser_skill to gather privacy-safe public financial guidance that can improve review-only household finance advice.

steps.label: Financial Advice Reporter
steps.goal: Write a review-only personal financial advisor report with status, advice, reminders, risks, and source evidence.

human.reason: Human approval is required before any financial action, external sharing, filing, payment, investment, or system-sync action.

rules.message: Human approval is required before advisor outputs are treated as final or used for consequential financial actions.

metadata.name: Personal Financial Advisor
metadata.description: A personal finance co-worker that monitors a local document folder. Put statements, receipts, bills, income records, images, text, JSON, or CSV files in the input folder; it OCRs and organizes the evidence, performs privacy-safe public research where useful, and writes review-only household finance summaries, risks, reminders, and source-grounded reports to the output folder.
metadata.agent_role: Actor-style continuous personal finance coworker with default-LLM specialists and a DockerWorker financial market researcher.
metadata.target_users: Individuals, households, freelancers, financial coaches, and operations teams reviewing personal finance documents.
metadata.customizable_for: Household budgeting, income and expense review, receipt tracking, bill reminders, cash-flow checks, and financial document intake.
metadata.problem: Households, solo operators, and financial coaches need a private continuous service coworker that can watch incoming finance documents, summarize cash-flow status, identify missing or risky items, and prepare human-review advice without moving money or sharing data.
runtime_features: actor-style LLM specialists use retrieved policy context when available

input_contract.description: Households, solo operators, and financial coaches need a private continuous service coworker that can watch incoming finance documents, summarize cash-flow status, identify missing or risky items, and prepare human-review advice without moving money or sharing data.

required_inputs.name: document_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder monitored for personal finance documents, statements, receipts, bills, income records, and images.

required_inputs.name: output_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder where JSON and Markdown advisor reports should be written.

required_inputs.name: field_profile
required_inputs.description: Financial review fields captured by the advisor.

optional_inputs.name: public_dataset
optional_inputs.description: Downloadable public dataset reference used for sample input selection.

optional_inputs.name: review_policy
optional_inputs.description: Human review and confidence thresholds for final packet release.

optional_inputs.name: monitoring
optional_inputs.description: Enable continuous folder polling and set interval/max cycles.

optional_inputs.name: input_folder
optional_inputs.description: Default local input folder for sample files or user-provided files.

mock.description: Uses the public dataset note and bundled text fixture when no local documents are selected.

json.description: Inline JSON object supplied through config or runtime overrides.

file.description: JSON object loaded from a local file path.

local_folder.description: Local folder mounted through OtterDesk local input handling.

final_artifact.description: Review-only structured document automation packet with source evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.

output_contract.stdout: JSON object with result, final_artifact, artifact paths, and run metadata when the runner is executed directly.

human_control.reason: Human approval is required before any financial action, external sharing, filing, payment, investment, or system-sync action.

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific document automation outputs.

human.description: Human notices, approval requests, responses, timeouts, and applied decisions.

input_skills.description: HostLocal filesystem intake and shared llm_ocr_skill OCR, with w3m_browser_skill public web research isolated to the research DockerWorker image.

inputs.description: Resolved document folder, public dataset reference, and field extraction profile.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and redacted document automation logs.

outputs.description: Primary review packet and structured extraction results.

resources.description: Resource samples such as token, runtime, connector, and disk usage.

web_ui.description: Optional review dashboard for artifact inspection.

knowledge_rag.description: Optional local blueprint knowledge retrieval used to ground actor prompts and tool planning.

agentic_research.description: Bounded LLM-selected or actor-guided tool contract for domain work.

init_config_review.instruction: Ask the user to select a local folder containing personal finance documents, confirm the output folder, and make clear that launch starts a continuous review-only monitoring service unless a bounded max cycle is set.

fields.label: Bank statement folder
fields.description: Choose a local folder containing Synthetic scanned bank statement PDFs with structured JSON metadata.

fields.label: Output folder
fields.description: Choose where review files should be written.

fields.label: LLM OCR
fields.description: Use the shared local LightOnOCR Docker Model Runner path for scanned or low-text documents.

dataset_input.name: AgamiAI Indian Bank Statement Synthetic Dataset
dataset_input.availability_note: Public synthetic bank statement sample used only as one finance-document demo source; real runs can include statements, income docs, receipts, bills, images, text, JSON, and CSV files.
dataset_input.download_hint: Use the bundled sample files or fetch a small public sample before trying a larger local folder.

metadata.local_on_prem_rationale: Personal finance documents can contain regulated and confidential details; local OCR and local report writing reduce unnecessary third-party transfer.

llm.agent_role: Actor-style household finance coworker using the default LLM for source-grounded review work.

responsibilities: review the monitored folder status
identify missing or newly changed document types
explain intake readiness without opening private web channels
summarize redacted finance document snippets
separate income, statement, receipt, bill, debt, and tax-document evidence
flag OCR or source-quality review needs
classify source-grounded income, expenses, balances, fees, and obligations
stay within allowed finance-document categories
explain classification uncertainty for human review
review cash-flow status from structured totals
explain blocker risks and reminders
prepare review questions without making consequential financial decisions
plan privacy-safe public web searches from generic risk categories
choose public sources from DuckDuckGo search results
summarize source-grounded public guidance without exposing private document text
write the final review-only household finance report
combine document analysis, health assessment, and research findings
preserve source refs and human-approval boundaries
keep private document text out of public web searches
ground every recommendation in local evidence or cited public sources
keep outputs review-only and require human approval before action

knowledge_rag.purpose: Retrieve local consumer-finance review guidance before LLM advice drafting and privacy-safe public research planning.
knowledge_rag.grounding_policy: Use retrieved local blueprint knowledge to improve actor review prompts; do not invent facts when retrieval is unavailable.
knowledge_rag.privacy: index local blueprint knowledge only; do not index private run documents unless a future runtime explicitly opts in

agentic_research.note: Financial advice actors derive public queries from generic risk categories and official consumer guidance only.

llm_ocr.purpose: shared local LightOnOCR-2-1B OCR for scanned PDFs, images, forms, statements, and bills

w3m_browser.purpose: privacy-safe public web research for source-grounded personal finance advice

knowledge_rag.purpose: Retrieve local consumer-finance review guidance before LLM advice drafting and privacy-safe public research planning.
knowledge_rag.grounding_policy: Use retrieved local blueprint knowledge to improve actor review prompts; do not invent facts when retrieval is unavailable.
knowledge_rag.privacy: index local blueprint knowledge only; do not index private run documents unless a future runtime explicitly opts in

agentic_research.note: Financial advice actors derive public queries from generic risk categories and official consumer guidance only.
